name: gl-inet-pp-mcp
description: The first maintained CLI for GL.iNet travel routers — named config profiles, travel macros, and version-aware diagnostics no other GL.iNet tool ships.

gl_inet_password.title: GL_INET_PASSWORD
gl_inet_password.description: Optional. Sets GL_INET_PASSWORD for the GL.iNet MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

gl_inet_user.title: GL_INET_USER
gl_inet_user.description: Optional. Sets GL_INET_USER for the GL.iNet MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
